meaning: Measure word; Classifier (in Chinese grammar), measure word
sentence: 学中文时量词是一个难点。
pinyin: Xué Zhōngwén shí liàngcí shì yī gè nándiǎn.
english: Measure words are a difficult point when learning Chinese.

sentence: 垃圾车每天早上七点来收垃圾。
pinyin: Lājī chē měi tiān zǎoshang qī diǎn lái shōu lājī.
english: The garbage truck comes to collect trash every morning at seven.

sentence: 他把自行车停在车库里。
pinyin: Tā bǎ zìxíngchē tíng zài chēkù lǐ.
english: He parked his bicycle in the garage.

sentence: 清明节我们去墓园祭扫。
pinyin: Qīngmíngjié wǒmen qù mùyuán jì sǎo.
english: We go to the cemetery to pay respects on Tomb Sweeping Day.

sentence: 请确认防火墙已开放这个端口。
pinyin: Qǐng quèrèn fánghuǒqiáng yǐ kāifàng zhège duānkǒu.
english: Please confirm that the firewall has opened this port.
